days.title: Cochin Arrival
activities: You will arrive at Kochi International Airport or Railway Station and proceed to your hotel.
After check-in and some rest, you will visit St. Francis Church, the oldest church in India.
Explore the historic Mattancherry Palace, built by the Portuguese.
In the evening, you can stroll through the local markets of Cochin.
Enjoy an overnight stay at your hotel.

days.title: Cochin to Munnar Transfer
activities: After breakfast at the hotel, you will check out and begin your journey to Munnar.
On the way, enjoy scenic views at Cheeyappara Waterfalls, Valara Waterfalls, and Karadippara Viewpoint.
Arrive in Munnar by evening and relax at your hotel for an overnight stay.
Places Covered: Cheeyappara Waterfalls, Valara Waterfalls, Karadippara Viewpoint

days.title: Munnar sightseeing
activities: Visit Mattupetty Dam and enjoy optional boating at your own expense.
Explore the Tea Factory and Tea Museum, followed by a visit to the scenic Echo Point.
Spend the evening at leisure and return for an overnight stay in Munnar.
Places Covered: Tea Factory and Tea Museum, Echo Point

days.title: Munnar to Thekkady Transfer
activities: Enjoy breakfast at the hotel before driving to Thekkady.
Visit the renowned Periyar National Park and Tiger Reserve, with optional activities like boat safari or bamboo rafting(at your own cost).
Check in to your hotel, then explore nearby spice plantations and the vibrant local spice market.
Spend your evening at leisure or shopping, followed by an overnight stay in Thekkady.
Places Covered: Periyar National Park , boat safari or bamboo rafting.

days.title: Thekkady to Alleppey
activities: After breakfast at the hotel, drive to Alleppey and check in to your deluxe sharing houseboat.
Enjoy a scenic backwater cruise passing by lush paddy fields, vibrant birdlife, and glimpses of traditional village life.
Relax and unwind with an overnight stay on the houseboat.
Places Covered: Houseboat stay in Alleppey

days.title: Alleppey to Kovalam
activities: You can enjoy a perfect sun rise from your houseboat and proceed to Kovalam.
After check-in formalities, the day is for leisure enjoy the beaches of Kovalam -  Lighthouse Beach, Kovalam Beach and Hawa Beach.
Overnight stay in the Hotel at Kovalam.
Places Covered: Lighthouse Beach, Kovalam Beach, Hawa Beach

days.title: Kovalam to Kanyakumari
activities: Enjoy breakfast at your hotel in Kovalam and get ready for a drive to Kanyakumari, which takes around 2.5 to 3 hours.
On arrival, begin sightseeing with a ferry ride to Vivekananda Rock Memorial.
Explore the impressive 133-feet tall Thiruvalluvar Statue and visit the revered Kanyakumari Temple.
After completing your sightseeing, return to Kovalam.
Overnight stay in Kovalam.
Places Covered: Vivekananda Rock Memorial, Thiruvalluvar Statue, Kanyakumari Temple

days.title: Kanyakumari to Rameshwaram
activities: Begin your journey from Kanyakumari to Rameswaram, enjoying a scenic 6–7 hour drive along the peaceful southern Tamil Nadu coastline.
Pass through picturesque landscapes featuring salt pans, lagoons, and charming rural villages.
Arrive in Rameswaram by afternoon and check in to your hotel for a relaxing break.
Spend your evening at leisure with an optional stroll along Agni Theertham beach, followed by an overnight stay in Rameswaram.

days.title: Rameswaram Exploration | Divine & Historic Landmarks
activities: Start your day with a visit to the revered Ramanathaswamy Temple, known for its grand corridors and status as one of the 12 Jyotirlingas.
Head to Agni Theertham, a sacred seashore spot where pilgrims take ritual baths.
Drive across the iconic Pamban Sea Bridge, enjoying breathtaking views of the ocean.
Explore the hauntingly beautiful Dhanushkodi, a ghost town where land meets the sea.
Visit the APJ Abdul Kalam Memorial to pay tribute to India’s beloved Missile Man.
If time permits, visit the Five-faced Hanuman Temple or climb Gandhamadhana Parvatham for panoramic views, followed by an overnight stay in Rameswaram.
Places Covered: Ramanathaswamy Temple, Pamban Sea Bridge, Dhanushkodi, Agni Theertham, Five-faced Hanuman Temple, climb Gandhamadhana Parvatham

days.title: Rameswaram to Madurai | Cultural Farewell
activities: After breakfast, drive to Madurai, a journey of approximately 3–4 hours through scenic Tamil Nadu.
Visit the iconic Meenakshi Amman Temple, renowned for its stunning Dravidian architecture and spiritual aura.
Conclude your trip with a drop-off at Madurai Airport or Railway Station for your onward journey.

title: 7 Days / 6 Nights
price: • If staying in a houseboat, relax as you float along the serene backwaters, passing by paddy fields, coconut groves, and small villages.

days.title: Munnar Local Sightseeing
activities: After breakfast, set out to explore Munnar’s breathtaking attractions.
Start with a visit to the Mattupetty Dam, an idyllic picnic spot known for its tranquil reservoir and boating activities (at your own expense).
Next, head to Kundale Lake, a serene water body surrounded by lush green hills.
Experience the natural acoustic marvel of Echo Point, where your voice resonates back.
In the afternoon, visit Rajamalai (Eravikulam National Park), home to the endangered Nilgiri Tahr.
The rolling grasslands and misty hills make for a perfect nature walk. Return to your hotel and unwind.
Overnight Stay at Munnar
Places Covered: Mattupetty Dam, Kundale Lake, Echo Point, Rajamalai (Eravikulam National Park)

days.title: Munnar to Thekkady (100 Km )
activities: After breakfast, check out and drive towards Thekkady, home to the renowned Periyar Wildlife Sanctuary.
On arrival, check into your hotel and later, visit Periyar Wildlife Sanctuary, one of the best places to witness wildlife in their natural habitat.
Opt for a boat ride on Periyar Lake (at your own expense) to catch glimpses of elephants, bison, and exotic bird species.
You can also explore a spice plantation (at your own expense), where you will learn about the cultivation of Kerala’s famous spices like cardamom, pepper, and cinnamon.
If interested, enjoy an elephant ride (at your own expense) for an unforgettable experience.
Overnight Stay at Thekkady
Places Covered: Periyar Wildlife Sanctuary, Periyar Lake, Spice Plantation

days.title: Thekkady to Alleppey (140 Km)
activities: Wake up to a refreshing morning and check out after breakfast. Drive towards Alleppey, often called the Venice of the East for its enchanting backwaters and serene houseboat experiences.
Upon arrival, check into your hotel or a traditional houseboat (houseboat stay at your own expense).
Visit St. Mary’s Forane Church, an architectural marvel, and later, enjoy the sunset at Alleppey Beach.
Overnight Stay at Alleppey
Places Covered: St. Mary’s Forane Church, Alleppey Beach, Backwater Cruise

days.title: Alleppey to Kovalam (180 Km)
activities: After breakfast, check out and drive towards Kovalam, a coastal paradise known for its golden beaches and azure waters.
On arrival, check into your hotel and head out to explore Lighthouse Beach, famous for its iconic lighthouse and mesmerizing sunset views.
Visit Samudra Beach, a serene and less crowded spot perfect for relaxation.
Later, explore the Rock Cut Cave Temple, an ancient site with exquisite carvings.
You can also indulge in thrilling water sports such as scuba diving, parasailing, and speed boating (at your own expense).
Overnight Stay at Kovalam
Places Covered: Lighthouse Beach, Samudra Beach, Rock Cut Cave Temple

days.title: Kovalam to Poovar and Trivandrum
activities: Post breakfast, check out and drive towards Poovar, a hidden gem with golden sand beaches and tranquil backwaters.
En route, visit the Aazhimala Shiva Temple, known for its magnificent Shiva statue and breathtaking sea views.
At Poovar, enjoy a boat ride (at your own expense) through the mangrove forests, witnessing floating cottages and the confluence of river, sea, and backwaters.
Later, head to Trivandrum for check-in and an evening at leisure.
Overnight Stay at Trivandrum
Places Covered: Aazhimala Shiva Temple, Poovar Backwaters

days.title: Trivandrum Local Sightseeing
activities: Start your day with a visit to Padmanabhaswamy Temple, one of the richest and most revered temples in India, known for its stunning Dravidian architecture.
Next, explore Napier Museum, home to rare artifacts and ancient Kerala art (entry fee at your own expense).
Admire the artworks at Sri Chitra Art Gallery, featuring paintings from various Indian and international artists (entry fee at your own expense).
Walk through Puthenmalika Palace, showcasing royal heritage and intricate woodwork (entry fee at your own expense).
End your day with a visit to Trivandrum Zoo, one of the oldest zoological parks in India (entry fee at your own expense).
Overnight Stay at Trivandrum
Places Covered: Padmanabhaswamy Temple, Napier Museum, Sri Chitra Art Gallery, Puthenmalika Palace, Trivandrum Zoo

days.title: Trivandrum to Cochin (240 Km) | Departure
activities: After breakfast, check out and drive back to Cochin for your departure.

Upon arrival, you will be dropped off at Cochin International Airport or Ernakulam Railway Station for your onward journey, carrying unforgettable memories of Kerala’s breathtaking landscapes and vibrant culture.
Trip Ends

days.title: Cochin Arrival and transfer to Munnar
activities: You will arrive in Cochin and picked up by our representative then you will be transferred to Munnar.
Overnight stay in Munnar.

days.title: Munnar sightseeing
activities: Visit Mattupetty Dam and enjoy optional boating at your own expense.
Explore the Tea Factory and Tea Museum, followed by a visit to the scenic Echo Point.
Spend the evening at leisure and return for an overnight stay in Munnar.
Places Covered: Tea Factory and Tea Museum, Echo Point

days.title: Munnar – Thekkady
activities: Enjoy breakfast at the hotel before driving to Thekkady.
Visit the renowned Periyar National Park and Tiger Reserve, with optional activities like boat safari or bamboo rafting at your own cost.
Check in to your hotel, then explore nearby spice plantations and the vibrant local spice market.
Spend your evening at leisure or shopping, followed by an overnight stay in Thekkady.
Places Covered: Periyar National Park , boat safari or bamboo rafting(optional)

days.title: Thekkady – Alleppey
activities: After breakfast at the hotel, drive to Alleppey and check in to your deluxe sharing houseboat.
Enjoy a scenic backwater cruise passing by lush paddy fields, vibrant birdlife, and glimpses of traditional village life.
Relax and unwind with an overnight stay on the houseboat.
Places Covered: Houseboat stay in Alleppey

days.title: Alleppey – Varkala
activities: After breakfast on the houseboat, disembark and proceed to Jatayu Earth’s Center to witness the world’s largest bird sculpture.
Continue your drive to Varkala and check in at your hotel or resort.
Spend the day exploring Varkala Cliff, relaxing at Papanasam Beach, and enjoying local cafes.
End your day with a beautiful sunset from the cliffs.
Overnight stay in Varkala.
Places Covered:  Jatayu Earth’s Center, Varkala Califf, Papanasam beach,

days.title: Varkala – Kovalam
activities: After breakfast, you will drive to Kovalam.
After check-in formalities, the day is for leisure enjoy the beaches of Kovalam -  Lighthouse Beach, Kovalam Beach and Hawa Beach.
Overnight stay in the Hotel at Kovalam.
Places Covered: Lighthouse Beach, Kovalam Beach, Hawa Beach

days.title: Kovalam – Trivandrum Drop
activities: After breakfast you will move to Trivandram.
Drop to Trivandrum Railway station/Airport and begin your onward journey.
Your trip ends here.

days.title: Kannur Arrival
activities: Pick-up from Kannur Airport/Railway station and drop to hotel. Done with check-in formalities and have some rest.
You will visit today Fort St. Angelo, built in 1505 by Portuguese and Arakkal Museum. In evening back to your hotel. Overnight stay in Hotel

days.title: Kannur to Wayanad Transfer
activities: After breakfast, You will visit remaining sightseeing of Kannur Kannur Lighthouse & Payyambalam Beach and proceed to Wayanad.  It will take 3 hour to reach Wayanad. On arrival check-in to your hotel. Overnight stay in Hotel.

days.title: Wayanad to Kozhikode Transfer
activities: After breakfast you will start local sightseeing of Wayanad.

Wayanad is known for its green mountains, lush forests and green paddy fields. You will explore Edakkal Caves, Soochippara Falls and Wayanad Wildlife Sanctuary after visiting these places proceed to Kozhikode.
On arrival check-in to your hotel And relex at Kozhikode Beach. Overnight stay in Hotel.

days.title: Kozhikode to Thrissur Transfer
activities: After breakfast you will go for local sightseeing of Kozhikode. Places you will see see kappad Beach (Kappad is the place where Vasco da Gama set foot for the first time), Kadalundi Bird Sanctuary, Pazhassiraja Archaeological Museum and Dolphin's Point after that proceed to Thrissur. On arrival check-in to your hotel. Overnight stay in your hotel.

days.title: Thrissur Sightseeing - Athirappilly Water Falls - Thrissur
activities: After breakfast we will go for excursion of Athirappilly Water Falls

When we talk about Athirappilly waterfall, we get a vision of actress Aishwarya Rai dancing for the song 'Barso re'!. Athirappilly waterfall is formed by Chalakudy River. It is largest waterfall of Kerala and also call "The Naigara of India". It is surrounded by a dense Vazhachal Forest Which is one of the best bio-diversity hotspots in Kerala.
In afternoon come back to the main city and visit remaining places of Thrissur - Thrissur Zoo & Museum and Vadakkunnathan Temple.  In evening back to your hotel. Overnight stay in Hotel

days.title: Thrissur to Cochin Departure
activities: After breakfast you will drop to Cochin International Airport/Railway station.

days.title: Cochin Arrival and transfer to Munnar
activities: You will arrive in Cochin and picked up by our representative then you will be transferred to Munnar.
Overnight stay in Munnar.

days.title: Munnar sightseeing
activities: Visit Mattupetty Dam and enjoy optional boating at your own expense.
Explore the Tea Factory and Tea Museum, followed by a visit to the scenic Echo Point.
Spend the evening at leisure and return for an overnight stay in Munnar.
Highlights of the Day: Tea Factory and Tea Museum, Echo Point

days.title: Munnar – Thekkady
activities: Enjoy breakfast at the hotel before driving to Thekkady.
Visit the renowned Periyar National Park and Tiger Reserve, with optional activities like boat safari or bamboo rafting at your own cost.
Check in to your hotel, then explore nearby spice plantations and the vibrant local spice market.
Spend your evening at leisure or shopping, followed by an overnight stay in Thekkady.
Highlights of the Day: Periyar National Park , boat safari or bamboo rafting.

days.title: Thekkady – Alleppey
activities: After breakfast at the hotel, drive to Alleppey and check in to your deluxe sharing houseboat.
Enjoy a scenic backwater cruise passing by lush paddy fields, vibrant birdlife, and glimpses of traditional village life.
Relax and unwind with an overnight stay on the houseboat.
Highlights of the Day: Houseboat stay in Alleppey

days.title: Alleppey – Cochin Drop
activities: You will drive from Alleppey to Cochin and depart for you onward journey from Cochin airport.
Your Journey Ends here.

days.title: Cochin Arrival and transfer to Munnar
activities: Arrival at Kochi International Airport/Railway station and transfer to Munnar. It will take approximately 4 hours to reach Munnar, enroute visit Cheyyappara Waterfalls and Valara Waterfall . In this beautiful journey of Munnar you will pass through the Pothamedu View Point, beautiful tea gardens spread like a green carpet over hundreds of kilometers and lush green hills.
On arrival check into the hotel.
Overnight at Hotel

days.title: Munnar City Tour
activities: After breakfast explore the Munnar City.

Munnar is also known as the 'Kashmir of South India'. It is famous for its lush green forests, spectacular tea estates, blankets of mist & craggy peaks and exotic varieties of flora & fauna. It is also home to some of the endangered species of animals like Neelakurinji and Nilgiri Tahr.

You will visit Eco Point, Kundala Lake, Tea Gardens, Tea Museum (Monday Closed), Eravikulam National Park(This is decided on ground as per the availability and rush) and Mattupetty Lake & Dam. In evening back to your hotel. Overnight stay in Munnar hotel.

days.title: Munnar to Alleppey Transfer
activities: After breakfast head towards Alleppey
Alleppey is famous for backwaters and houseboat cruises. Which will give you glimpse of green paddy fields, pleasing avifauna and choir making activities.
Check in Houseboat and make a trip through the best possible canals in Alleppey.
Overnight stay in houseboat.

days.title: Alleppey to Cochin Departure
activities: After breakfast you will drop to Cochin International Airport/Railway station.

title: 6 Days / 5 Nights
price: • Take back memories of Kerala’s lush landscapes, backwaters, and cultural richness.

days.title: Cochin Arrival – Munnar Transfer
activities: Arrive at Cochin Airport or Railway Station and drive to Munnar (130 km / approx. 4 hrs).
En route, enjoy scenic landscapes, Cheeyappara Waterfalls, and mountains shrouded in low-hanging clouds.
Check in at the hotel in Munnar and relax for the evening.
You will stay overnight at a hotel in Munnar.
Highlights of the Day: Cheeyappara Waterfalls

days.title: Munnar Sightseeing
activities: After breakfast, visit Mattupetty Dam and enjoy boating amidst lush surroundings.
Explore the tea gardens, Echo Point, and the picturesque landscapes of Munnar.
Visit Top Station, Eravikulam National Park, and witness Anamudi Peak.
Evening free at leisure to relax or explore local markets.
You will stay overnight at a hotel in Munnar.
Highlights of the Day:  Echo Point, Anamudi Peak, Eravikulam National Park

days.title: Munnar – Thekkady
activities: After breakfast, transfer to Thekkady (120 km / approx. 3.5 hrs).
Visit Periyar National Park, home to diverse wildlife and part of the Tiger Reserve.
Explore spice plantations and shop for authentic spices from local vendors.
Check in at the hotel and relax for the evening.
You will stay overnight at a hotel in Thekkady.
Highlights of the Day: Periyar National Park

days.title: Thekkady – Alleppey
activities: Drive to Alleppey and board a traditional Kerala Houseboat.
Enjoy freshly prepared meals onboard and relax amidst serene surroundings.
You will stay overnight on the Houseboat in Alleppey.
Highlights of the Day: Houseboat stay in Alleppey.

days.title: Alleppey – Cochin
activities: Disembark from the Houseboat and transfer to Cochin (90 km / approx. 1.5 hrs).
Explore Cochin’s heritage sites: Jewish Synagogue, Mattanchery Palace, St. Francis Church, and Chinese Fishing Nets.
Check in at the hotel and spend the evening at leisure.
You will stay overnight at a hotel in Cochin.
Highlights of the Day: Jewish Synagogue, Mattanchery Palace, St. Francis Church, and Chinese Fishing Nets

days.title: Depart Cochin
activities: After breakfast, transfer to Cochin Airport or Railway Station for your onward journey.
